disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prolonged anterior nosebleed of about 45 minutes not controlled by simple first aid
trigger_question_examples: How long has your nose been bleeding?
Has it stopped at any point?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been bleeding for about three-quarters of an hour now, and pinching it hard isn't stopping it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Takes daily warfarin for a mechanical heart valve
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular medicines?
Are you on any blood thinners?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I take warfarin every day for a mechanical heart valve, and I have regular blood tests to check it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Started a new antibiotic for a urinary tract infection three days ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medicines recently?
Any new tablets in the last week or two?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I did start some antibiotics for a water infection about three days ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood, no black tarry stools, no blood in urine
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood or seen black stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't brought up any blood, no black poo, and nothing in my wee.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden severe headache, weakness, vision change, confusion or drowsiness
trigger_question_examples: Any sudden bad headache, weakness or trouble with your vision?
Do you feel confused or unusually drowsy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my head's fine, no headache or weakness or vision trouble.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No dizziness on standing, faintness or palpitations
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint or dizzy when you stand up?
Any pounding or racing of your heart?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel faint, just anxious about how much blood there is.
